title: wedelia pinetorum
intro: Wedelia pinetorum, also known as Wedelia or False Daisy, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Wedelia pinetorum include the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. In traditional medicine, Wedelia pinetorum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide relief from various health conditions.
